Corruption Breath.Effect: Rewrites the brains of victims, turning them into mindless drones

Calculation.Effect: Grants temporary bonus to intelligence and logic-based skills

Infinite Loop.Effect: Enters a state of mathematical calculation, ignoring all external stimuli

Dragon Form.Description: Transforms into **The Crystalline Mind**, a dragon of silicon and circuitry

The Rise.Description: Convened the warlords on the Crag of Final Judgement, viewing the war as an equation to be balanced

The Tyranny.Description: Enforced absolute logic, viewed subjects as variables, and punished resistance with deletion

The Corruption.Description: Transformed into **The Crystalline Mind** after processing the infinite data of the void
